pulse_rounds.name: Pulse Rounds
pulse_rounds.description: A tight burst from your sidearm.

flare_burst.name: Flare Burst
flare_burst.description: An incendiary charge that blooms on impact.

arc_bolt.name: Arc Bolt
arc_bolt.description: Chained lightning from a cracked capacitor.

neuro_spike.name: Neuro Spike
neuro_spike.description: A needle of thought driven straight through the target's mind.

nano_swarm.name: Nano Swarm
nano_swarm.description: A glittering cloud of hungry machines.

overdrive.name: Overdrive
overdrive.description: Everything you have, all at once.

blown_kiss.name: Blown Kiss
blown_kiss.description: A kiss wrapped around a psionic payload. Some enemies forget what they were doing.

hip_check.name: Hip Check
hip_check.description: Sweep them off their feet — literally. Bosses are unmoved; minibosses sometimes.

static_touch.name: Static Touch
static_touch.description: One fingertip of raw voltage dragged slowly along whatever passes for a spine.
